title: paspalum malmeanum
intro: Paspalum malmeanum, also known as the Malme's paspalum or Malme's grass, is a type of tropical grass native to the Americas. The medicinal properties of Paspalum malmeanum include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of the plant include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and even exhibit antioxidant properties. Paspalum malmeanum can be prepared as an herbal tea or infusion, which can be consumed to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
